name: Help Scout
access_notes: API access is gated by the Help Scout plan level; the Free plan does not include access to the API or integrations.
auth_notes: The Mailbox API uses OAuth2, while the Docs API uses API keys passed via HTTP Basic Authentication.

evidence.claim: The Free plan does not include access to the API or integrations.
The Docs API uses API keys, while the Mailbox API uses OAuth 2.0.
Help Scout provides Inbox and Docs APIs for read/write operations.
Search citation: Help Scout User Management API Guide | Stitchflow

blocker: Access is blocked for users on the Free plan.
one_liner: Help Scout provides customer service software featuring a shared inbox, knowledge base tools, and live chat capabilities.
api_notes: The API covers core objects including Mailbox (conversations, customers, etc.) and Docs management. Reporting endpoints are restricted to higher-tier paid plans.
mcp_notes: No official or widely recognized community Model Context Protocol server was identified in the provided documentation or open-source listings.
